𝗔𝗬𝗔 | Providing a user-friendly desktop GUI for managing and debugging Android devices connected via ADB.  🔥 Super Hot!

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Providing a user-friendly desktop GUI for managing and debugging Android devices connected via ADB.
📅 Created: Oct 2024 • Updated: Jul 2026

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Screen mirror
✅ File explorer
✅ Application manager
✅ Process monitor
✅ Layout inspector
✅ CPU, memory and FPS monitor
✅ Logcat viewer
✅ Interactive shell


❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5.2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 301 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 75 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

AYA is a desktop application that provides a graphical user interface for controlling Android devices via ADB. It simplifies common development and debugging tasks by offering a visual wrapper around the command-line ADB tool.

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/liriliri/aya

𝗢𝗣𝗘𝗡𝗦𝗘𝗥𝗣 | Providing a self-hosted, multi-engine Search Engine Results Page (SERP) API for AI, LLM, RAG, and SEO automation tasks, especially for non-Google search engine coverage.  🌟 Rising Fast!

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Providing a self-hosted, multi-engine Search Engine Results Page (SERP) API for AI, LLM, RAG, and SEO automation tasks, especially for non-Google search engine coverage.
📅 Created: Jun 2023 • Updated: Jul 2026

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Multi-engine support (Google, Yandex, Baidu, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Ecosia)
✅ Megasearch across multiple engines
✅ URL extraction with content parsing (Markdown, Text)
✅ SERP features (AI summaries, answer boxes, etc.)
✅ Image search
✅ Advanced filters (language, date, file type, site)
✅ Multiple data formats (JSON, Markdown, Text, NdJSON)
✅ Configurable proxies, cache, and resilient mode
✅ Docker support


╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 933 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 119 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 11 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

OpenSERP is an open-source, self-hostable API and CLI that provides live search data from multiple search engines like Google, Yandex, and Bing. It's designed for AI, SEO, and automation workflows, offering features like URL extraction, SERP feature parsing, and various data output formats.

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/karust/openserp
